steps: Go to https://manage.auth0.com and log in to your Auth0 tenant
Navigate to Applications > Applications in the left sidebar
Enter a name, select 'Machine to Machine Applications', and click 'Create'
In the next screen, select 'Auth0 Management API' from the API dropdown
Grant the required scopes (e.g., read:users, create:users) and click 'Authorize'
Go to the application's Settings tab and note the Domain, Client ID, and Client Secret
Request an access token via POST to https://YOUR_DOMAIN/oauth/token with grant_type=client_credentials
Use the returned access_token as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Management API Access Token
credential_fields.description: A JWT access token obtained via client credentials grant from your Auth0 Machine-to-Machine app. Replace YOUR_DOMAIN in the base URL with your tenant domain (e.g., myapp.us.auth0.com).

notes: The base URL must be customized to your tenant domain (e.g., https://myapp.us.auth0.com)
Access tokens from the client credentials grant typically expire in 24 hours — you must refresh them
Free tier available with up to 7,500 monthly active users
The Management API is pre-configured in Auth0 — no need to register it separately
Scopes must be explicitly granted to the M2M app for each operation you want to perform

test_endpoint.description: List users in the tenant to verify the Management API token is valid
